# **HQS Cloud**
HQStage
* * *
HQStage is a lightweight tool for installing and using HQS software. Want to learn more about what you can do with our software? Explore our [ quantum simulation use cases ](https://quantumsimulations.de/use-cases) or read through the  use cases  section in this documentation. 
[use HQStage](https://cloud.quantumsimulations.de/software)
HQSpectrumBeta Free Trial
* * *
Analyse 1H NMR spectra from low-field or high-field devices
[try HQSpectrum](https://hqspectrum.cloud.quantumsimulations.de/app/trial)
  * [ Contact ](https://cloud.quantumsimulations.de/contact)
  * [ Imprint ](https://cloud.quantumsimulations.de/imprint)

  * [ Terms of use ](https://public.cloud.quantumsimulations.de/doc/250923_HQS_General_Terms_and_Conditions.pdf)
